tests.name: intake_wizard_upgrade_deployment_target_naming
tests.details: Runbook Section F prescribes intake-wizard.sh --upgrade-deployment private_poc. Script accepts only personal|organizational and rejects 'private_poc'. Worked around by passing 'organizational' (correct mapping per Section A scenario table). This may be a runbook issue and/or a missing scenario-aware upgrade alias. See framework_bugs[2].

framework_bugs.summary: upgrade-project.sh aborts on self-cp under set -euo pipefail (BL-009/BL-015 helper refresh)
framework_bugs.reproduction: From a project that already has scripts/pending-approval.sh and scripts/lint-uat-scenarios.sh (i.e. any project initialised after PR #17), invoke bash scripts/upgrade-project.sh --deployment organizational from the project root. Lines 1471-1474 do `cp "$SCRIPT_DIR/$helper" "scripts/$helper"` where $SCRIPT_DIR resolves to the project's own scripts/. On macOS, BSD cp prints 'cp: scripts/pending-approval.sh and .../scripts/pending-approval.sh are identical (not copied).' and returns non-zero, which aborts the script under `set -euo pipefail` (top of file).
framework_bugs.expected: Helper-script refresh should be idempotent: skip when source and destination resolve to the same inode, or pre-check with realpath/stat before copying. upgrade-project.sh should exit 0 when the upgrade actually completed.
framework_bugs.actual: Upgrade script exits with RC=1 immediately after the helper-refresh cp. Subsequent steps (post-upgrade validation, final 'Upgrade complete.' print) never execute. .claude/phase-state.json fields like deployment/track are never written (compounds U-J).

framework_bugs.summary: U-J confirmation: upgrade-project.sh does not write deployment/track/poc_mode/gov_mode into .claude/phase-state.json
framework_bugs.reproduction: Run scripts/upgrade-project.sh --deployment organizational on a project initialised via init.sh --non-interactive. Inspect .claude/phase-state.json afterwards.
framework_bugs.expected: phase-state.json fields .deployment, .track, .poc_mode, .gov_mode should reflect the new values, since phase-state.json is what U-E (PR #17) made canonical for poc_mode lookup.
framework_bugs.actual: .deployment remains 'personal', .track remains 'standard', .poc_mode/.gov_mode remain null. Only intake-progress.json (when present), CLAUDE.md and PROJECT_INTAKE.md are updated. This is the same U-J open from prior sweep; re-confirmation.

framework_bugs.reproduction: From a project root: bash scripts/intake-wizard.sh --upgrade-deployment private_poc
framework_bugs.expected: Either (a) the flag accepts scenario names (private_poc, sponsored_poc, production) and translates them to the correct deployment+gov_mode pair, OR (b) the runbook/help text clarifies that --upgrade-deployment takes only 'personal|organizational' and a separate --to-private-poc / --to-sponsored-poc / --to-production path drives the gov_mode. Right now the runbook command and the script are out of sync.
framework_bugs.actual: Script prints '[FAIL] Invalid target deployment: private_poc (must be: personal, organizational)' and exits 1. Workaround used: --upgrade-deployment organizational, which leaves gov_mode/poc_mode null.

documentation_gaps.gap: Runbook Section F instructs `intake-wizard.sh --upgrade-deployment {TARGET_DEPLOYMENT}` for private_poc|sponsored_poc, but the script only accepts personal|organizational. Either add a --to-private-poc handler symmetric with --to-sponsored-poc / --to-production, or document the actual personal->private_poc upgrade path (which currently appears to be: --upgrade-deployment organizational then a separate gov_mode write that does not exist).

scripts/upgrade-project.sh has no documented or implemented path that takes a personal/light project to a private_poc gov_mode. --to-sponsored-poc exists; --to-production exists; there is no --to-private-poc.

summary: personal/mobile/standard -> private_poc upgrade blocked by Critical regression: upgrade-project.sh self-cp under set -euo pipefail aborts at line 1471 (BL-009/BL-015 helper refresh introduced by PR #17 U-H fix). U-J also re-confirmed (phase-state.json deployment field not written). Runbook/script naming mismatch on --upgrade-deployment private_poc vs organizational documented as Medium gap.
